answer:
The expected utility is the average of \(U(80000 + \text{bonus})\) over the seven equally likely bonuses.  
Calculating each \( (80000 + b)^{1/4} \), averaging them, and then raising the result to the 4th power gives the certainty equivalent.  
This value is approximately 108,610, which corresponds to option B.

\boxed{B}
